content:
type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) helper above TextBlock; image_to_base64 validator now does: self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image); then filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing). No new methods added to ImageBlock class body itself, so your get_image_mimetype() addition should merge cleanly as long as it calls normalize_image_bytes/reads self.image_mimetype rather than re-deriving mimetype guessing logic inline.

fields.summary: Added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) helper above TextBlock; image_to_base64 validator now does: self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image); then filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing). No new methods added to ImageBlock class body itself, so your get_image_mimetype() addition should merge cleanly as long as it calls normalize_image_bytes/reads self.image_mimetype rather than re-deriving mimetype guessing logic inline.
